name: ThirteenTorsionDegree
why_it_matters: Odd torsion-tower rung above psi_11: deg(psi_13) = (13^2 - 1)/2 = 84 bounds the 13-torsion x-coordinates (#E[13] <= 169). A direct instance of the proved uniform bound secp256k1_odd_preΨ_natDegree (Ecdlp/Proved/OddTorsionBound.lean), stated as a concrete named level in the style of FiveTorsion/SevenTorsion; as a targets/queue.json seed it also validates the queue -> registry -> stem lifecycle end to end.
lean_stem:
import Mathlib
import Ecdlp.Proved.DivisionPolynomial
import Ecdlp.Proved.DivisionPolynomialDegree

namespace Ecdlp.Curve

open Polynomial

theorem secp256k1_preΨ₁₃_natDegree : (secp256k1.preΨ' 13).natDegree = 84 := by
hint: Mirror Ecdlp/Proved/SevenTorsion.lean at n = 13: `have h13 : ((13 : ℕ) : ZMod Secp256k1.p) ≠ 0 := by rw [Ne, ZMod.natCast_eq_zero_iff]; native_decide` then `rw [secp256k1.natDegree_preΨ' h13]; decide`. Equivalently instantiate `secp256k1_odd_preΨ_natDegree` (Ecdlp/Proved/OddTorsionBound.lean) at n = 13.
